_validation_note: Validates each row against the declared FLOW schema; any violation routes the row to a reject output (errorCode 8), valid rows pass unchanged on main. 'schema' is the flow column list and is normally supplied by the flow, not hand-authored. Type-coercion checks apply to numeric types {int, float, Decimal} and bool; the date-pattern check applies to 'datetime' columns ONLY when strict_date_check=true AND the column has a date_pattern (Java SimpleDateFormat, e.g. yyyy-MM-dd). Deferred/no-op feature flags (accepted but NOT yet implemented -- logged as WARNING when true): customer, sub_string, fast_date_check, ignore_timezone.
